catalog.title: ONLINE BOXING / PAD HOLDER SAFETY COURSE
catalog.description:
The Punchfit® Boxing / Pad Holder Safety Course is designed to educate you on the critical safety aspects, the basic Duty of Care requirements, Safe Pad Holding plus some never ever’s when teaching Boxing Pad Work for Fitness or Boxing Pad Work for Ring Fighting. Achieving a 100% pass in the online exam confirms you are aware of many common, potentially dangerous and legal liable situations that can occur whilst teaching Pad Work.

Est Time to Complete: Under 1 Hour

No Pre Requisites

WHO SHOULD I COMPLETE THIS COURSE?

Personal Trainers, Fitness Instructors, PE Instructors, Martial Arts Instructors, Coaches, Fighters, Pad Holders and Gym Owners.

This Online Course may be considered the minimum requirement for Insurance Companies, please check with your current insurance provider to find out more!

The course can also be used to recap, refresh and reinforce the safety aspects and Duty of Care that you have learnt if you have completed one of our Face to Face Courses.

COURSE REQUIREMENTS

There are NO pre-requisites for undertaking this course.

It will require a reliable internet connection.

WHAT YOU’LL LEARN

  1. Safe Client Control
  2. Safe Protective Requirement
  3. Safe Pad WorkPosition
  4. Safe Technique Application to Equipment
  5. Safe Position of Pad Holding
  6. Safe control of powerful clients
  7. Safe precautions for evasion drills
  8. Safe Technique Correction
  9. Safe Training of Minors
  10. Safe Alternatives for minor padwork
  11. Safe placement of equipment
  12. Safe floor space requirements
  13. Safe Hygiene Practice
  14. Safe Warm Up Requirements
  15. Safe management of Work Loads
  16. Safe incorporations of strength & conditioning
  17. Safe equipment evaluation
  18. Safe Padwork Combinations

catalog.title: PUNCHFIT® ONLINE BOXING COURSE
catalog.description:
DESIGNED FOR PERSONAL TRAINERS, GYM INSTRUCTORS, COACHES & BOXING PAD HOLDERS.

ONLINE BOXING COURSE

EST TIME TO COMPLETE: APPROX 6-8 HOURS
NO PRE REQUISITES REQUIRED

The Punchfit® Boxing Level 1 Instructor certification course has been constructed by bona fide World Class Master Fight Trainers, with research and development skills reaching back full-time since 1989, to give you true skills proven safe by over 40,000 participants.

Since the early days of fitness boxing, fitness professionals and personal trainers have been picking up boxing focus pads with no practical experience or authentic qualifications while charging professional fees.

Punchfit® provides authentic education and register for the boxing fitness industry to recognise authentic value-for-money trainers with legitimate, proven skills for hire.

Punchfit®has travelled all over the country, and globally, delivering ring-proven, pre-tested, authentic boxing and padwork techniques for fitness professionals.
In today’s landscape, face-to-face learning is less accessible and more risky than ever before. Educators have a duty of care to their students and to the community and for this reason, Punchfit® has adapted to online education in order to deliver an unrivalled boxing and pad holding experience to you to access from anywhere at anytime!

Upon successful completion of this course, you have unlimited access to the course and can download your certificate.

GUARANTEED AUTHENTIC SINCE 1989


LEARNING OUTCOMES

  1. Safety considerations & Duty of Care requirements
  2. Understand the benefits of boxing
  3. How to learn and instruct effective hand wrapping techniques
  4. How to learn and instruct effective sport-specific warm ups to minimise risk of injury
  5. How to learn and instruct making a proper fist to minimise the risk of injury
  6. How to learn and instruct an effective & safe boxing stance for both orthodox & southpaws
  7. How to learn and instruct an effective guard & fundamental footwork
  8. How to learn and instruct 6 basic punches
  9. How to learn and instruct proper pad holding skills
  10. How to control space and utilise effective combinations as a pad holder
  11. How to use boxing sticks
  12. How to use boxing paddles
  13. How to use a boxing round shield 
  14. How to safely conduct defensive, evasive & movement-based drills
